purpose: Machine-readable rules for building Academy 1198 scene_contract before calling ChatGPT.
core_principle: Build a current_frame first. Then select only relevant full character cards, current state/memory, relevant relationship slice, current calendar day, visible knowledge boundaries, and forbidden context. Do not invent context or center every scene on Akira by fallback.

build_steps.name: read_current_frame
build_steps.rule: Do not repair missing frame by assuming Akira, court, registration, or default Academy location. Return diagnostic if required frame data is absent.

build_steps.name: split_full_and_reference_characters
build_steps.rule: Use active/speaking/addressed/observing/physically present for full_character_ids; keep scheduled/delayed/future-beat characters as reference_character_ids.

build_steps.name: select_scene_characters
build_steps.rule: Select POV first, then physically present/active characters, then only characters required by current scene goal or direct relevant mention.

build_steps.name: select_relationship_context
build_steps.rule: Load only relationship data for pairs relevant to full characters and current scene. Do not dump all pairs connected to Akira.

build_steps.name: select_calendar_lore_location_context
build_steps.rule: Use current day and current place only. Future days are for explicit timeskip/audit, not normal play.

build_steps.name: write_visible_knowledge_boundaries
build_steps.rule: For each loaded character, state known, unknown, and must_not_assume when names, past, relationships, hidden facts, or item/location knowledge matter.

build_steps.name: write_forbidden_context
build_steps.rule: List facts not loaded or not yet known that ChatGPT must not use in narration, dialogue, NPC decisions, or relationship updates.

build_steps.name: emit_scene_contract
build_steps.rule: ChatGPT receives the scene_contract/current digest, not the whole repository and not stale old schedule files.

builder_failure_rules: If no active character can be selected, return a diagnostic error instead of choosing Akira automatically.
If a character is only scheduled/delayed, do not load full card; keep reference-only with expected beat.
If hidden/past context is desired but no trigger exists, do not load it; add it to forbidden_context.
If a selected character is missing required main/character files, return diagnostic instead of replacing them with a short summary.
